market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Leeds Private Oasis, 57% above median rates
Exclusive Garden Hideaway in Central Leeds
Luxury Leeds Getaway, Enclosed Garden & Private Parking
analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to a serene Leeds oasis, perfect for up to 4 guests. This stunning entire home boasts a private, enclosed garden and designated parking. Enjoy the peace and quiet in a highly sought-after area, just a short walk from Leeds' vibrant city centre. With 76 glowing reviews and a Superhost badge in sight, this property is a must-visit for anyone looking for a luxurious and relaxing getaway. The generous, open-plan living space is ideal for families or friends, with plenty of room to unwind and enjoy each other's company. With a private entrance, guests can come and go as they please, and the secure parking means you can leave your car safely on site. Whether you're looking for a romantic break, a family adventure or simply a well-deserved rest, this beautiful home has everything you need to unwind and recharge. So why wait? Book your stay today and discover the ultimate Leeds oasis!
top_amenity_gaps: Parking and private access is a highly valued amenity, yet this feature is not highlighted in the listing.
Leeds is a city with many attractions and activities; the listing's lack of entertainment amenities is notable.
A garden and outdoor space are essential for relaxation and comfort, but the listing could provide more information on this feature.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a photo of the garden as the cover photo, as it showcases the property's unique feature and sets the tone for a serene and peaceful stay.
key_diagnosis: The occupant has significant room to improve their occupancy rate, currently 21.7% booked (70 open nights) vs the cohort median 28.3%.
Adding amenities in the Outdoor, Parking and facilities, and Entertainment categories could provide a significant boost to occupancies.
Given the high nightly rate of £275.00, which is +57% above the cohort median of £175.00, the listing could benefit from a more compelling title that addresses this unique selling point.
analysis.outreach_hook: With an occupancy rate of 21.7% booked (70 open nights), you have significant room to improve your occupancy rate and grow your earnings.
